faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the DIMOP digitalization grant.

items.question: Who is eligible for the DIMOP digitalization grant?
items.answer: Micro and small businesses with low digital intensity. Exact eligibility criteria depend on the grant call — our pre-qualifier tells you in 2 minutes.

items.question: Is the support really 90%?
items.answer: Yes, the DIMOP grant offers up to 90% non-refundable support. Your contribution is only 10% — for an €21K project, that's about €2,100.

items.question: What can be claimed under the grant?
items.answer: Hardware (computers, servers, network equipment), off-the-shelf/SaaS software (CRM, ERP, project management), and related services (implementation, training, consulting).

items.question: How are you different from a grant-writing agency?
items.answer: Grant writers handle paperwork. We implement the entire project: hardware procurement, software deployment, AI solution development, training, and operations. We're a dev team, not consultants.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: Basic package typically takes 4–6 weeks, Business 6–10 weeks, Advanced 10–16 weeks. This includes assessment, implementation, and training.

items.question: What happens after the project?
items.answer: We provide ongoing support and maintenance. Business package includes 3 months, Advanced includes 12 months of premium support. After that, we offer affordable monthly maintenance plans.

items.question: Can custom software development be covered?
items.answer: Custom development directly cannot, but off-the-shelf/SaaS software implementation, customization, and related consulting can. All our AI solutions are delivered in a grant-compliant structure.

cta.title: Don't miss the 90% EU grant funding.
cta.subtitle: Grant budget is limited. The sooner you act, the more certain your spot.
